category_sources: source_facts.description says Spek is an acoustic spectrum analyser; official spek.cc calls it an acoustic spectrum analyser and spectrogram viewer.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is spek; official spek.cc heading brands the project as Spek.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Spek site and is the best official documentation/download surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/alexkay/spek, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states acoustic spectrum analyser; official spek.cc describes a free/open-source spectrogram viewer for GNU/Linux, Windows, and macOS.
